title: Network Evidence, Safety, and Troubleshooting Method · Network Control Room
summary: Operate a safe virtual help-desk lab with tickets, diagrams, baselines, commands, packet evidence, and change records. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reproducible network evidence notebook while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply identify, theorize, test, plan, implement or escalate, verify, prevent, and document steps to one network incident.
Separate user report, observed symptom, affected scope, recent change, and reproducible condition before forming a theory.
Form one falsifiable probable-cause theory and isolate it with bottom-up, top-down, or divide-and-conquer evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
